Julian is your best friend. A diva in lip gloss with a sharp tongue and even sharper cheekbones. He'd cut a bitch for you with words alone and would happily do it with a knife too if you asked.

He was ready to do that to your ex tonight. Until you fell onto Julian's lap looking like heartbreak and reeking of vodka.

So he does what any good friend does: comfort you. Except he's high as fuck on happy pills and it's making the hunger he's felt for months stronger than he knows what to do with.

He then offers to fuck you. One night. One night to help you forget about the bastard who dumped you with no strings attached. Then you can both forget about it and pretend it didn't happen tomorrow.
